message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for crossbeam and dependency resolution

Regenerated lockfile reflecting recent dependency changes:
- crossbeam added to frankenterm-term (from parallel resize commit)
- asupersync upstream pin updated (base64 version disambiguation)
- Transitive dependency additions from workspace evolution
  (getrandom, serde features on ahash, base64 0.13.1 coexistence)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
